message:
feat(core): add scheduler CPU budget enforcement, fairness, and degradation detection (ft-2p9cb.2.1.2)

Extends three-lane scheduler with guardrails and diagnostics:
- has_cpu_budget()/remaining_cpu_us(): per-lane CPU budget checking
- next_lane(): strict-priority lane selection with budget awareness
- fairness_ratios(): actual vs configured CPU share per lane
- SchedulerDegradation: input starvation, bulk starvation, control backlog
- SchedulerLogEntry: structured per-epoch logging
- 12 new unit tests (215 total), all 81 proptests pass

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
